description: Saved view management panel for TmDataTable and TmMultiViewList, supporting personal and tenant-scoped views with create, edit, delete, and apply operations. Includes a modal for configuring view name, scope, visible columns, grouping, and filters via IDataTableViewProvider.

examples.title: View manager integrated with data table
examples.code:
<TmViewManager Provider="@viewProvider"
               ViewContext="employees"
               OnViewApplied="ApplyView"
               GetCurrentView="GetCurrentTableView"
               AvailableColumns="@availableColumns"
               FilterDefinitions="@filterDefs"
               CanCreateTenantViews="true"
               CurrentUserId="@userId"
               CurrentTenantId="@tenantId" />
